name: Kredivo Indonesian BNPL and Digital Credit API
what_it_does: Kredivo Indonesian buy-now-pay-later (BNPL) and digital credit REST API for Indonesian e-commerce merchants and payment platforms to offer Kredivo BNPL checkout options to Indonesian consumers — enabling interest-free 30-day payment, 3/6/12 month installment payment, and digital credit line integration in Indonesia's growing e-commerce ecosystem. Enables AI agents to manage BNPL checkout for Indonesian installment payment automation, handle payment redirect for Kredivo authentication automation, access order confirmation for fulfillment trigger automation, retrieve transaction status for payment verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle cancellation for order lifecycle automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve settlement for merchant disbursement automation, manage fraud check for transaction risk automation, and integrate Kredivo with Indonesian e-commerce platforms and payment gateways for end-to-end BNPL checkout automation.
use_cases: Offering Kredivo BNPL checkout options to Indonesian consumers for e-commerce payment automation agents
Processing Kredivo installment payments and receiving settlement disbursement for merchant automation agents
Integrating Kredivo with Indonesian marketplace and e-commerce platforms for BNPL payment option agents
Handling Kredivo payment webhooks and order status updates for fulfillment workflow automation agents
not_for: Non-Indonesian consumers (Kredivo is Indonesia-focused BNPL, not regional SEA)
B2B enterprise credit (Kredivo is consumer BNPL for Indonesian individuals)
Physical retail POS without online component (Kredivo is primarily e-commerce checkout)
best_when: An Indonesian e-commerce merchant, marketplace, or payment platform wanting AI agents to integrate Kredivo BNPL checkout options for Indonesian consumers across interest-free 30-day and installment payment plans.
avoid_when: OJK REGULATED FINTECH: Kredivo operates under Indonesian Financial Services Authority (OJK) digital lending regulation; automated non-OJK-compliant deployment creates regulatory violation; automated must ensure OJK-compliant lending practice disclosures. CONSUMER REDIRECT IS MANDATORY: Kredivo BNPL requires consumer to authenticate in Kredivo's app; automated server-side payment initiation without consumer redirect creates checkout failure; automated must redirect consumer to Kredivo authentication flow. CREDIT ELIGIBILITY IS DYNAMIC: Kredivo credit approval depends on consumer creditworthiness assessed by Kredivo's model; automated guaranteed approval assumption creates declined_by_kredivo response; automated must handle declined payment states gracefully. MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Kredivo BNPL requires signed merchant agreement; automated open API access assumption creates no access; automated must complete Kredivo merchant onboarding before integration.

auth.notes: Kredivo uses API key (server key) for merchant API authentication. REST API with JSON. Jakarta, Indonesia HQ. Founded 2015 by Akshay Garg and Alie Tan. Products: BNPL (30 days interest-free), installment (3/6/12 months), digital credit line. SDKs: None public. OJK licensed. 3M+ users. Parent: FinAccel. Raised $200M (Series C 2021). Competes with Akulaku and SPayLater for Indonesian BNPL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (MDR) per transaction; settlement T+1 or T+2 basis
pricing.notes: Jakarta ID. OJK licensed. MDR per transaction. Indonesian BNPL focus. FinAccel parent.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; checkout and transaction APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CONSUMER REDIRECT MANDATORY: Kredivo BNPL requires consumer to authenticate in Kredivo app via redirect; automated server-side checkout without consumer interaction creates payment initiation failure; automated must implement Kredivo redirect URL flow for consumer authentication

CREDIT APPROVAL IS NOT GUARANTEED: Kredivo performs dynamic credit assessment; automated 100% approval rate assumption creates unhandled declined response; automated must implement graceful fallback to alternative payment methods when Kredivo declines

MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED FIRST: Kredivo BNPL requires signed merchant agreement; automated open API sandbox assumption without merchant status creates no production access; automated must complete merchant onboarding and agreement before production deployment

OJK DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS: OJK mandates specific BNPL disclosure language to consumers; automated custom checkout without OJK-required disclosure creates regulatory violation; automated must display OJK-required installment terms and interest disclosures

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION: Kredivo webhook events require signature verification; automated unverified webhook processing creates spoofed payment confirmation vulnerability; automated must verify Kredivo webhook signature before processing payment events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indonesian BNPL. OJK, Bank Indonesia, PCI-DSS. API key. Indonesia. Consumer credit and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indonesian BNPL. OJK, Bank Indonesia. API key. Indonesia. Consumer credit and transaction data.
